view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of hybrid participation parity.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of hybrid participation parity.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Hybrid participation parity (remote can ask questions, vote)', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where remote students can participate, the prior steps do not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks that explicitly demonstrate this capability. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of specific evidence supporting the requirement.
